class.name: ComputeHelper
class.brief_description: Abstraction for generating textures using compute shaders.
class.description: Used to create and manage resources used for texture generation with compute shaders. It handles clean-up on its own.

method.name: clean_up
method.description: Iterates over all RIDs that were stored and frees them.

method.name: compile_shader
method.description: Takes the path to the ".glsl" shader and returns the created RID.

method.name: compute_result
method.description: Creates the compute pipeline and start the compute shader. It forces synchronization with the CPU and returns the buffer data at the "texture_id" RID.

method.name: create_rd
method.description: Should be called once at the beginning, creates a local rendering device for using the compute shader API.

method.name: create_ssbo
method.description: Creates a storage buffer object and returns its RID.

method.name: create_texture
method.description: Creates a new texture using the specified parameters and returns its RID.

method.name: create_uniform
method.description: Creates the uniform using the specified parameters and returns its RID.

members.member: Size used internally for starting the compute shader.

signal.name: texture_updated
signal.description: Called when the texture output data from "compute_result" is ready to be read on the CPU.
